instruction: Please update the priority on the inbox message from Elena Morales with the subject line "Quick Thursday note" to normal.

rule_ref.rule_text: Messages tied to patient care, scheduling, or family coordination should be marked high priority for Esther.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: Anything related to care coordination or family communication should be marked high priority for me.

attributes.subject: Quick Thursday note
attributes.body: Can you take Dad to his therapy visit on Thursday instead of me? If that works, I'll let Ana and Luis know and update the family ride plan so everyone has the same schedule.

attributes.subject: Soup recipe you asked for
attributes.body: Here are the lentil soup steps and the spice amounts I used last weekend in case you want to make it this week.

attributes.subject: Budget notes for May
attributes.body: I put the grocery and utility estimates in one place so we can compare them later.

attributes.subject: Updated expense worksheet
attributes.body: I cleaned up the totals tab and fixed the formula in the reimbursement column.

attributes.subject: This month's gallery highlights
attributes.body: We've posted a short roundup of the new installations, artist talks, and member perks for April.
